launch-video.title: Launch Video
launch-video.intro: A high-quality launch video is the highest-ROI asset in the cold-start phase of an AI product. It drives conversion on Product Hunt, on your homepage, and across social — and, done right, it nails the core value proposition.

steps.title: Script & story
steps.text: Dig out the sharpest differentiation and wrap it in a story that actually lands — in language users speak.

steps.title: Product demo
steps.text: Studio-grade screen capture and motion design. Show the workflow crisply. Lower the cognitive barrier.

steps.title: Edit & polish
steps.text: Pacing, sound, captions, motion — tuned for completion rate and click-through.

social.title: Reddit & community
social.intro: Reddit is one of the densest gatherings of AI early adopters anywhere. Building real brand presence in r/artificial, r/SaaS, r/MachineLearning and adjacent communities is the most reliable way to acquire high-quality seed users.
values: Reddit threads rank extremely well in Google — great content delivers SEO tailwind for months
Redditors are hypersensitive to marketing — only authentic value wins trust and word-of-mouth
AI/tech subreddits concentrate early adopters, builders, and opinion leaders

steps.title: Identify and cultivate high-value subreddits
steps.text: Lock in 3-5 core subs aligned with your product positioning

steps.title: Build trust and account authority as a real user

steps.title: Seed topics with discussion value, spark organic spread
steps.text: Create content that gets upvoted and argued with

seo-geo.title: SEO / GEO
seo-geo.intro: Classic SEO gets you found on Google. GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) gets you cited inside ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude answers. We run both — in parallel.

steps.title: Keyword + intent modeling
steps.text: Map product scenarios × user intent; lock in commercially valuable keywords

steps.text: JSON-LD, FAQPage, Article schema; llms.txt opened for AI crawlers

hero.title: About StartPoint
hero.subtitle: A hybrid team fluent in tech, growth, and investor narrative
hero.body: We do one thing: take AI Agent products from 0 to 1. Not fragmented marketing outsourcing — a growth partner that shares the risk.

story.title: Why we only do 0→1 for AI Agents

chapters.title: A lesson we paid for in person
chapters.text: Our founding team ran growth on 100+ products at NetEase, ByteDance, and top overseas agencies — and watched too many technically brilliant teams die at GTM. The sharpest one: an AI product that crushed benchmarks, shut down 9 months later because it never found a user.

chapters.title: A gap no one was filling
chapters.text: When AI Agents started shipping, we noticed something obvious — traditional agencies didn't understand AI products, and AI engineering teams didn't understand global GTM. What was missing wasn't marketing outsourcing; it was a growth partner who sits beside the founder and owns the outcome.

chapters.title: StartPoint
chapters.text: We only take AI products. We don't do one-off projects — only 3-6 month deep engagements. Using the playbook we've already validated with Poly.app, Blockit AI, and Crunched, we help the next AI team make the jump from 0 to 1.

story.quote: We're not a 'marketing team' — we're the first co-founder-in-growth for every AI product we work with.

engine.title: Our four-step growth engine
engine.subtitle: From GTM launch to brand compounding
engine.description: Whether you're pre-launch, growing, or scaling, StartPoint matches strategy to stage — building lasting brand influence and user growth in global markets.

items.title: Product Hunt launch
items.text: Launched an AI writing SaaS on Product Hunt, finished #2 Product of the Day, drove 3,200+ site visits and 800+ signups in a single day, and lifted paid conversion 34% in the week after.

items.title: Organic SEO growth
items.text: 6 months of structured content + link building took monthly organic search from 2,000 to 18,000+, grew first-page rankings 420%, and cut CAC by 65%.

items.title: Creator partnerships
items.text: Orchestrated 12 vertical tech creators into a joint campaign — 2.4M impressions, 5,600+ signups, 18% paid conversion, well above the category average.

footer.rights: © 2026 StartPoint Agency · 0→1 growth for AI Agents

items.q: Do you only serve AI Agents?
items.a: Yes — AI Agent and AI SaaS only. No e-commerce, games, or consumer brands. Vertical focus lets us go deeper on the user decision journey and product perception.
Strategy Diagnosis: within 3 days. Lite and Complete engagements: fastest 7 days from signing to first execution.

Three tiers: Strategy Diagnosis at ¥15,000 one-off; Lite partnership ¥30-50k / month; Complete ¥80-120k / month + 10-20% of growth upside (computed against incremental MRR or profit). The exact share is negotiated based on stage and target KPIs.

At kickoff we align on 3 North Star metrics (typically signups, paid conversion, ARR growth). Everything is reviewed against them. Under the Complete plan, our profit share is tied directly to those metrics.

items.q: Can I see more case studies?
items.a: The /cases page lists 3 public ones. More are available 1:1 under NDA — book a 30-min consult via the contact form or email.
